basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has published the Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Scientist position under the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding a B.Tech., M.Tech., M.C.A., or Post Graduate degree in the relevant discipline with first class or equivalent are eligible to apply through Email on or before 20 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are provided below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./ M.Tech./ M.C.A./ Post Graduate in relevant discipline having 1st class or equivalent in the appropriate discipline.
qualification.details: Project Scientist: B.Tech./M.Tech./M.C.A./ Post Graduate in relevant discipline having 1st class or equivalent in the appropriate discipline. Desirable: Hands-on experience in mechatronics systems design, robotics integration, control systems, sensor interfacing, embedded systems, data acquisition, and rapid prototyping (e.g., CAD/3D printing), PCB Designing. Strong analytical, programming (C/C++ Python) and experimental setup skills. Problem-solving ability, and independent project execution. Strong understanding of signal processing and power electronics for wearable applications. Knowledge in Embedded C, ROS programing, Field Oriented Control, Real Time Operating System, Knowledge of flexible and stretchable electronics.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Scientist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Delhi Project Scientist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Scientist Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Delhi Project Scientist Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Scientist: B.Tech./M.Tech./M.C.A./ Post Graduate in relevant discipline having 1st class or equivalent in the appropriate discipline. Desirable: Hands-on experience in mechatronics systems design, robotics integration, control systems, sensor interfacing, embedded systems, data acquisition, and rapid prototyping (e.g., CAD/3D printing), PCB Designing. Strong analytical, programming (C/C++ Python) and experimental setup skills. Problem-solving ability, and independent project execution. Strong understanding of signal processing and power electronics for wearable applications. Knowledge in Embedded C, ROS programing, Field Oriented Control, Real Time Operating System, Knowledge of flexible and stretchable electronics.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Scientist Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications via email for the IIT Delhi Project Scientist recruitment is 20th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a B.Tech./M.Tech./M.C.A./ Post Graduate degree in a relevant discipline with a first-class or equivalent grade in the appropriate discipline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 47,790 to Rs. 62,350 per month, plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Project Scientist position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email by sending their resume and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Scientist post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Delhi for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for this recruitment is http://ird.iitd.ac.in, which can be found in the 'Important Links' section.
